title: Tag Claude in, right where you already work
summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Tag, allowing users to invoke Claude directly within Slack by tagging @Claude in threads. The feature maintains channel context, integrates with organizational tools, and persists work across multiple days without requiring recontextualization. Currently available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
writeup: Anthropic's video introduces Claude Tag, a feature that lets users invoke Claude inside Slack by tagging @Claude within threads. Claude reads channel context, connects to organizational tools, and persists work across multiple days without requiring recontextualization, which keeps assistance grounded in ongoing conversations rather than isolated prompts. The feature is in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
